title: Exotelcraft
description: A large multi-feature Minecraft mod mainly adding the Exotel dimension, toggleable April Fools' snapshot content, overworld additions, an in-game mod manager, craftable world map, and optional Bedrock-styled UI.
body:
![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KedisPL/Exotelcraft-Hub/main/main/images/ExotelcraftMain.png "Exotel Promo")
6.4.0 RELEASE (MC 26.1+) OR NEWER EXOTELCRAFT VERSION IS RECOMMENDED
--------------------------------------------------------------
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/870666302673543208?style=flat-square)](https://discord.gg/q88hexpX5R "Discord") ![Mod loader: Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-Forge-1976d2?style=flat-square) ![Mod loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-Fabric-1976d2?style=flat-square) ![Mod loader: Quilt](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-Quilt-1976d2?style=flat-square)

- Forge and NeoForge versions requires: [Kriforfab](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kriforfab "Kriforfab") - Exotelcraft 5.2.0 RELEASE - 6.2.0 RELEASE
- Fabric version requires: [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api "Fabric API") until 6.2.0 RELEASE
- Old Forge version requires: [Reforged Fabric API](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reforged-fabric-api "Reforged Fabric API") - Exotelcraft 5.0.0 BETA-4 - 5.1.0 RELEASE
- Quilt version requires: [Quilted Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/qsl/files "Quilted Fabric API") until 6.2.0 RELEASE

## What is **Exotelcraft**?

**Exotelcraft** is a mod for Minecraft Java that mainly adds a new dimension called **Exotel**. This mod also adds things from April Fools snapshots, bedrock edition secret blocks and so much more!

## What does this mod have?

- 1 dimension
- Over 200 new blocks
- New items
- Over 12 new biomes
- New entities
- New structures
- Bedrock Edition UI (OreUI)
- Education and Bedrock edition stuff
- April Fools snapshots stuff
- And more!

## How to enter the dimension?

You need to craft Exotel Portal Igniter from 2 Blaze Rods and 1 Netehrite Scrap. Then create a portal with blackstone and ignite it with Exotel Portal Igniter.

![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KedisPL/Exotelcraft-Hub/main/main/images/IgniterRecipe.png "Exotel Portal Igniter Recipe")

![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KedisPL/Exotelcraft-Hub/main/main/images/ExotelcraftPortal.png "Exotel Portal")

## Compatibility with other mods

This mod changes a lot of Minecraft code through Mixins, so it may not work with some mods or features from them may not work.
